channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: UK businesses are still struggling to get the most out of cloud, and it's costing them big
item.description: Businesses are struggling to move forwards, so they’re not able to fully benefit from technologies like AI.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 4 prerequisites for IT leaders to navigate today’s era of disruption
item.description: For its Generative AI Readiness Report, IT services company Avanade surveyed over 3,000 business and IT executives in 10 countries from companies with at least $500 million in annual revenue.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Black Friday PS5 deals live: I've tracked PlayStation deals for years and these are my top picks for PS5 and PS5 Pro so far
item.description: We're rounding up all the Black Friday PS5 deals and PS5 Pro discounts that come in during this year's sales period.
item.dc:creator: rob.dwiar@futurenet.com (Rob Dwiar), TechRadar

item.title: How to use ref structs in C# 13
item.description: In the C# programming language, structs or structure types are value types that allow faster access because they are usually stored in the stack.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Swiss 'AI Jesus' project to bridge digital and the divine draws users' praise, as questions remain
item.description: LUCERNE, Switzerland (AP) — Would you trust an “AI Jesus” with your innermost thoughts and troubles? Researchers and religious leaders on Wednesday released findings from a two-month experiment through art in a Catholic chapel in Switzerland, where an avatar of “Jesus” on a computer screen — tucked
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Johnson to host Musk, Ramaswamy at Capitol ahead of DOGE work
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) will host Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the co-leads of the newly established "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE), at the Capitol on Dec. 5, he announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: AI’s data problem: How to build the right foundation
item.description: 2024 was undoubtedly “the year of AI,” with businesses across the globe attempting to fast-track implementations. In fact, EY’s 2024 Work Reimagined Survey found that Generative AI (GenAI) adoption skyrocketed from 22% in 2023 to 75% in 2024.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok Restricts Appearance Effects for Users Under 18
item.description: TikTok restricts certain appearance effects for users under 18 in response to a study on beauty filters and young users.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: A software developer gives thanks
item.description: Tomorrow, we in the US celebrate Thanksgiving. So today seemed like a good time for me to recognize the people and technologies in the software development world that I’m most thankful for.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Australia’s lower House passes social media ban for under-16s
item.description: Communications Minister Michelle Rowland said the Senate would debate the bill later Wednesday. The major parties' support all but guarantees the legislation will pass in the Senate, where no party holds a majority of seats.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AI PCs for federal: The future of edge computing
item.description: How AI PCs supplemented by extreme search capabilities will enable federal employees at the edge to leverage more data to make better decisions, faster. The post AI PCs for federal: The future of edge computing first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Explicit ‘deepfake' images of nearly 50 teens rocks Pennsylvania school
item.description: Students have used AI technology to create fake explicit images of classmates in Washington, California and New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: These digital product trends will define 2025
item.description: Consumer preferences, technology innovations, and emerging market forces—from AI capabilities to platform shifts and sustainability imperatives—shape how we build digital products and their success in the market.
item.dc:creator: Brad Weber, Fast Company

item.title: Biden Administration Pledges $6.6 Billion Loan for Electric Vehicle Maker Rivian
item.description: The Biden administration has announced a $6.6 billion loan to support the construction of an electric vehicle plant in Georgia, sparking debate over the impact on traditional automakers and job creation.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: Instagram's Threads gets 35 million new users this month
item.description: Nearly 35 million new users have flocked to Instagram's Threads this month as the Meta platform seeks to capture users leaving X and keep an edge over emerging platform Bluesky.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: NARA to launch AI tool to improve customer experience
item.description: Sheena Burrell, who was NARA's chief information officer until Nov. 21, said the agency is upgrading systems to deliver a modernized user experience. The post NARA to launch AI tool to improve customer experience first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: CISA debuts new cybersecurity training platform
item.description: The new "CISA Learning" system will offer the same training to both internal staff and tens of thousands of external users. The post CISA debuts new cybersecurity training platform first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Stanford prof accused of using AI to fake testimony in Minnesota case against conservative YouTuber
item.description: Jeff Hancock, an expert on AI and misinformation, has been accused of fabricating an expert declaration by citing a study that was allegedly made up by AI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Free email services are costing you more than you think
item.description: Free email accounts come with hidden costs to privacy. Technology guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the risks involved with email accounts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AWS prepares to command an army of AI agents
item.description: According to a recent report from SNS Insider, the global AI agents market was valued at $3.7 billion in 2023. The market is expected to grow to $103.6 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate of 44.9% during the forecast period from 2024 to 2032.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A Thai court on Thursday threw out a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist which alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: JERRY HARMER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI networking a focus of HPE’s Juniper deal as Justice Department concerns swirl
item.description: Amid reports of US regulatory concerns over HPE’s proposed buy of Juniper Networks, the CEOs of both companies talked about the future of the blended entity at this week’s HPE Discover event in Barcelona – and that future includes plenty of AI networking technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World
